name: McDonald Park
description: McDonald Park is a place to play pickleball in Bay St. Louis, MS. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: The Club at Diamondhead
description: The Club at Diamondhead is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Diamondhead, MS. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: The Tennis Club at Diamondhead
description: The Tennis Club at Diamondhead is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Diamondhead, MS. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights and restrooms.
